releaseNotes: Fixes a crash where pressing OK on a search result (or any channel) dropped you to the home screen instead of playing — the TV player now opens reliably. Fixes DLHD sports channels (e.g. Supersport Grandstand) that showed a black screen, so all 710 DLHD-only channels tune correctly. Restores brand logos for logo-less channels (the old logo service was shut down). New on Android TV: a broadcast-style TV Guide (filter chips, favourites-first, GUIDE remote button). Adaptive EPG window (6h normal, 2h low-RAM). Instant-visuals tuning: the player now picks the first feed verified to actually stream, so a dead source never parks you on a black screen; fixed a tuning freeze. Mobile guide: correct clock labels, 6h scroll, no overlaps. Fixed ~940 channel logos (e.g. TSN 2). Typo-tolerant search fix. Player minimize is now a down-chevron. First automated test suite.
